name: Activate OpenWiki maintainer from browser merges

elements.name: Local activation approved
elements.documentation: The operator approved a local browser-to-Herdr bridge and rejected polling and a public-repository self-hosted runner.

elements.name: Build generic merge userscript
elements.documentation: Create a Tampermonkey userscript for any GitHub pull-request page that opens a local activation URL only after the final merge confirmation.

elements.name: Build validating local handler
elements.documentation: Discover and validate the qq-linked Repository, verify the PR URL and GitHub merge facts, ignore recursive wiki merges, deduplicate merge commits, and dispatch through Herdr.

elements.name: Register local protocol safely
elements.documentation: Register the qq-openwiki protocol handler and document the one-time userscript setup while preserving unrelated desktop and MIME state.

elements.name: Verification entry
elements.documentation: Merge initial implementation and every correction path before running the focused checks again.

elements.name: Run focused bridge checks
elements.documentation: Exercise generic Repository discovery, input refusal, GitHub verification, recursion protection, deduplication, launch, wake, userscript, and installer preservation behavior.

elements.name: Checks green?
elements.documentation: Only locally verified bridge behavior advances to independent review.

elements.name: Fix check failures
elements.documentation: Correct only in-scope failures and rerun the checks that observe them.

elements.name: Run fresh-context review
elements.documentation: Give the exact verified working-tree Change to an independent read-only reviewer before commit or publication.

elements.name: Confirmed findings?
elements.documentation: The accountable agent verifies each reported failure path before changing the implementation.

elements.name: Fix confirmed findings
elements.documentation: Apply the smallest in-scope correction and return through focused verification.

elements.name: Open activation PR
elements.documentation: Commit and push the green reviewed Change and open one pull request carrying intent and Check evidence.

elements.name: PR green?
elements.documentation: The Change is ready only when its applicable GitHub checks pass.

elements.name: Fix PR failures
elements.documentation: Correct an in-scope handoff failure and return through local verification and review.

elements.name: Activation PR green
elements.documentation: The local activation Change is green for operator handoff; OpenWiki BPMN generation remains the separate TASK-6 follow-on.

flows.documentation: Approval starts implementation of the browser-side detector.
The browser signal crosses only through the validating local protocol handler.
The validated bridge is provisioned through the existing local installer surface.
The complete coherent unit enters verification.
Initial implementation and corrections use the same focused checks.
Observed results determine whether review can begin.

flows.name: no
flows.documentation: A failing Check requires an in-scope correction.
Every check fix is re-observed by the focused suite.

flows.name: yes
flows.documentation: Green local behavior advances to independent judgment.
The accountable agent verifies the review output.
Review corrections return through verification before publication.

flows.name: no
flows.documentation: A reviewed Change with no confirmed findings can be published.
The published Change must pass applicable GitHub checks.

flows.name: no
flows.documentation: An in-scope PR failure returns to local correction and verification.
PR corrections are rechecked and re-reviewed before another handoff.

flows.name: yes
flows.documentation: A green PR ends the planned implementation flow.
